passives.name: Ashlander
passives.description: Increases your experience gain with the Dual Wield skill line by 15%. Reduces your damage taken from environmental lava by 50%.

passives.name: Dynamic
passives.description: Increases your Max Magicka and Max Stamina by 1910.
